hints.VENUS: Hottest planet; named for the Roman goddess of love
hints.EARTH: The third planet from the sun
hints.MARS: The red planet, fourth from the sun
hints.ORANGE: Round citrus fruit and the color it shares its name with
hints.GRAPEFRUIT: Large bitter citrus, often pink inside
hints.KNIGHT: Chess piece that moves in an L-shape
hints.ROOK: Chess piece shaped like a castle tower
hints.PAWN: Smallest chess piece, only moves forward
hints.FOOT: Body part at the end of your leg, or a unit of length
hints.SNOW: White precipitation that falls in winter
